notes: Dinner menu captured for Ivar's Acres of Clams (not Salmon House, despite header); includes starters, soups/salads, classic fried items, simply-prepared fish, northwest favorites, and hand-helds. No beverage pricing captured — wine/bar/spirits menus listed as downloadable PDFs only, so beverages skipped.

dishes.name: Bread Basket
dishes.description: Four Macrina Bakery sourdough rolls, whipped butter

dishes.name: Panko Crusted Crab Cakes
dishes.description: Tomato relish, chipotle-lime aioli

dishes.name: Coconut Crusted Shrimp
dishes.description: Sweet chili sauce

dishes.name: Seared Fresh Ahi Tuna
dishes.description: Sesame-red chili crust, sweet chili sauce, wasabi, pickled ginger

dishes.name: Fresh Sautéed Manila Clams
dishes.description: White wine, butter, fennel, mirepoix, grilled toast points

dishes.name: Crispy Calamari
dishes.description: Chipotle-lime aioli

dishes.name: Crab & Goat Cheese Dip
dishes.description: Parmesan cheese, cream cheese, panko, toasted crostini

dishes.name: Fried Brussels Sprouts
dishes.description: Balsamic glaze, Parmesan cheese

dishes.name: Ivar's Famous White Clam Chowder
dishes.description: Northwest-style clam chowder with bacon. Available as cup, bowl, or bread bowl.

dishes.name: House Green Salad
dishes.description: Spring mix, grape tomatoes, English cucumber, carrot threads, balsamic vinaigrette dressing. Available entrée size.

dishes.name: Classic Caesar Salad
dishes.description: Romaine lettuce, anchovy-garlic dressing, shredded Parmesan cheese, garlic crostinis, Parmesan crisps. Available entrée size.

dishes.name: Wedge Salad
dishes.description: Iceberg lettuce, grape tomatoes, blue cheese crumbles, crispy bacon, blue cheese dressing

dishes.name: PNW Protein Cobb
dishes.description: Dungeness and rock crab, smoked scallops, bay shrimp, bacon, blue cheese crumbles, grape tomatoes, English cucumbers, sliced egg, avocado, Thousand Island dressing

dishes.name: Ivar's World Famous True Cod Fish 'n Chips
dishes.description: 3-piece Alaska Cod, French fries. 4-piece also available.

dishes.name: Alaska Halibut 'n Chips
dishes.description: Mac & Jack's Amber-panko crust. 2-, 3-, or 4-piece available.

dishes.name: Cajun Salmon 'n Chips
dishes.description: 3-piece Alaska wild salmon, French fries. 4-piece also available.

dishes.name: Fried Northwest Platter
dishes.description: Alaska cod, surf clam strips, jumbo prawns, Cajun salmon, French fries

dishes.name: Prawns 'n Chips
dishes.description: Jumbo prawns, French fries. 6- or 10-piece available.

dishes.name: Alaska's Finest — Simply Prepared
dishes.description: Choice of simply prepared fish served with red skinned mashed potatoes and seasonal vegetable. Options: Halibut, Cod, Coho Salmon, Weathervane Scallops, King Salmon, Salmon Duo (King & Coho), or Mixed Grill (Halibut & King Salmon).
dishes.price_note: Halibut $37; Cod $30; Coho Salmon $32; Weathervane Scallops $35; King Salmon $36; Salmon Duo $35; Mixed Grill Halibut & King Salmon $39

dishes.name: Acres of Clams
dishes.description: 2-lb local Manila clams, fennel, potato, onion, carrot, celery, white wine, grilled baguette

dishes.name: Seafood Linguine
dishes.description: Shrimp, clams, scallops, spicy marinara sauce, crispy garlic, parsley, grilled toast points

dishes.name: Panko Crusted Crab Cakes (Entrée)
dishes.description: Tomato relish, chipotle-lime aioli, red skinned mashed potatoes, seasonal vegetable

dishes.name: Pan Seared Crab Crusted Alaska Halibut
dishes.description: Lemon-thyme beurre blanc, balsamic reduction, house specialty rice, seasonal vegetable

dishes.name: Seared Chicken Piccata
dishes.description: Lightly breaded, panko, Parmesan cheese, lemon-butter sauce, white wine, capers, parsley, spaghetti, seasonal vegetable

dishes.name: King Crab Legs
dishes.description: Red skinned mashed potatoes, seasonal vegetable, drawn butter. Available in 1/2-lb or 1-lb.

dishes.name: Wagyu Blend Half Pound Cheeseburger
dishes.description: Tillamook Cheddar, Thousand Island, lettuce, tomato, red onion, brioche bun, pickle, fries. Add bacon or fried egg for extra charge.

dishes.name: Grilled Columbia River Steelhead BLT
dishes.description: Bacon, lettuce, fresh tomatoes, jalapeño-ginger tartar sauce, brioche bun, pickle, fries

dishes.name: French Dip Sandwich
dishes.description: Caramelized onion, provolone, French roll, creamy horseradish, au jus, fries. Add sautéed mushrooms for extra charge.

dishes.name: Crab Cake Sandwich
dishes.description: Brioche bun, chipotle-lime aioli, lettuce, tomato, pickle, fries

dishes.name: Cod Tacos
dishes.description: Lightly battered and fried, corn tortillas, Napa cabbage, Mexican crema, pico de gallo, cilantro, tortilla chips and salsa
